summary: Carryover from Feb 25: Gemini 3.1 Pro launch, Intapp Celeste agentic platform, n8n CVE security alerts, DeepSeek V4 rumors, LangChain alternatives trending.

highlights.title: Intapp Celeste: Agentic AI for Professional Firms
highlights.summary: Purpose-built agentic AI platform for highly regulated industries. Context Engine knows firm data, terminology, relationships.
highlights.relevance: Agentic AI pattern for regulated industries—relevant for Gulf financial services.

highlights.title: CRITICAL: n8n 8 CVEs
highlights.summary: Eight high-to-critical vulnerabilities in n8n. Upgrade to 2.5.2+ required immediately.

highlights.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro Live
highlights.summary: 1M token context, 77.1% ARC-AGI-2, multimodal native. Direct GPT/Claude competitor.

tech_research.title: DeepSeek V4 Rumors
tech_research.summary: 90% HumanEval, 1M context. Pricing threat to OpenAI/Anthropic.
tech_research.relevance: Non-US model option for Gulf clients.

tech_research.title: LangChain Alternatives
tech_research.summary: Flowise, Pydantic AI gaining traction for simpler orchestration.

tech_research.title: Ollama Adds Models
tech_research.summary: Local inference for Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, DeepSeek.
